title: Claude Sonnet 4 Released
summary: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 4 with improved reasoning, 200K context, and 2× faster inference vs Sonnet 3.5.

title: Claude Opus 4 — Most Capable Claude Yet
summary: Anthropic's flagship Claude Opus 4 sets new benchmarks on SWE-bench and reasoning evals. Extended thinking enabled by default.

title: OpenAI Cuts GPT-4o Pricing by 50%
summary: OpenAI reduces GPT-4o input cost to $2.50/1M tokens and output to $10/1M — making it significantly more competitive.

title: Gemini 2.0 Flash Goes GA
summary: Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash achieves GPT-4o-mini quality at 3× lower latency. Now available in all regions.

title: DeepSeek R1 Open-Sourced
summary: DeepSeek releases R1 as fully open-source, rivaling o1 on math and coding benchmarks at a fraction of the API cost.

title: OpenAI o3 Available via API
summary: o3 brings frontier reasoning to the OpenAI API with configurable thinking budget. Outperforms o1 across all reasoning benchmarks.

title: Meta Llama 3.3 70B — Dense SotA
summary: Llama 3.3 70B achieves Llama 3.1 405B quality in a 70B parameter footprint, ideal for self-hosted inference.

title: Google × Anthropic — Frontier Safety Pact
summary: Google DeepMind and Anthropic sign a joint safety research agreement covering frontier model evaluation frameworks.

title: Mistral Large 2 Pricing Reduced
summary: Mistral cuts Mistral Large 2 pricing by 35%, making it the most cost-competitive European frontier model.

title: Claude Haiku 4 — Fastest Claude
summary: Haiku 4 delivers Claude Sonnet 3.5-level quality at sub-200ms TTFT. Best-in-class for real-time applications.

title: xAI Grok 2 via API
summary: xAI opens Grok 2 to API developers with vision support and 131K context. Available on api.x.ai.

title: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B Surpasses GPT-4o on Code
summary: Alibaba's Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B tops HumanEval and SWE-bench Lite, open-sourced under Apache 2.0.
